capabilities.label: Practice Website
capabilities.cap: Honesty review gates publish. The OFFICE performs the deterministic build + publish after the clinician's okay — a worker never deploys.
capabilities.description: Build, fact-check, and publish one honest private-practice website on a hosted address the practice can share the day it's approved. The $-anchor deliverable.

capabilities.label: Growth Engine
capabilities.description: Data-driven content loop: pick topic from real demand signal, draft, GEO-optimize, honesty-review. No auto-publish.

capabilities.label: Weekly Blog
capabilities.description: One honest cited post per week plus three social teasers. Stops at honesty review.

capabilities.label: Backlink Engine
capabilities.description: White-hat earned backlinks: Quora, Reddit, Medium/Substack (rel=canonical), LinkedIn, HARO. Human posts every piece — agent never auto-posts.

capabilities.label: Page Copy
capabilities.description: Landing, about, services, and bio page copy. Clinician reviews and publishes — agent never touches the site.

capabilities.label: Decks & Handouts
capabilities.description: Psychoeducation slides, workshop decks, group handouts, supervision packets. Outputs a slide-by-slide draft with speaker notes, ready to paste into Google Slides or PowerPoint. Clinician builds the file and delivers.

capabilities.label: Proposals & Letters
capabilities.description: Referral-partner proposals, group contracts, supervision agreements, speaking offers. Outputs a ready-to-send letter draft to paste into Google Docs or Word. Clinician signs and sends.

capabilities.label: Ad Creative
capabilities.description: Three ad copy variants plus image briefs for Google, Meta, and directory placements. Clinician places the ad — agent never touches ad platforms.

capabilities.label: Newsletter
capabilities.cap: Delivery is the clinician's own email tool. Free tiers on beehiiv and MailerLite cap subscriber lists. Clinician manages their own plan and list size.
capabilities.description: Practitioner updates, psychoeducation digests, workshop announcements. Outputs a formatted draft. Clinician sends.

capabilities.label: Research Desk
capabilities.cap: Synthesis from the model's own general knowledge — no live database or web access. Every named source must be independently verified by the clinician before relying on it.
capabilities.description: Ask one clinical-topic or practice question; get an honest, verify-first research brief — scoped sub-questions, confidence-labeled findings, practical considerations, and a source checklist. Informational background, never clinical advice.
